markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on post-holiday content, strategy, and operational changes.](https://fathom.video/share/yBBfTxLw2L2rx7Z-zGugVtQWPfEcsmfv?tab=summary&timestamp=127.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Disclosure Format:** Approved by Thread, a new superscript disclosure format will clean up page layouts. Dave will document the new rules for GrowthX to automate the process.](https://fathom.video/share/yBBfTxLw2L2rx7Z-zGugVtQWPfEcsmfv?tab=summary&timestamp=632.0)
  - [**Content Strategy Shift:** To avoid content feeling "samey," Relay wants to experiment with new topics and formats (e.g., listicles, quizzes). GrowthX will provide examples of their programmatic content capabilities.](https://fathom.video/share/yBBfTxLw2L2rx7Z-zGugVtQWPfEcsmfv?tab=summary&timestamp=592.0)
  - [**Bi-Weekly Cadence:** The sync will shift to a bi-weekly cadence to focus on strategic insights. Project management updates will move to async Slack communication.](https://fathom.video/share/yBBfTxLw2L2rx7Z-zGugVtQWPfEcsmfv?tab=summary&timestamp=476.0)
  - [**2026 Planning:** A 2026 planning session will be scheduled for late January to align on KPIs and content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/yBBfTxLw2L2rx7Z-zGugVtQWPfEcsmfv?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy & Expansion

  - [**Problem:** Content is becoming "samey," prompting a desire to experiment with new topics and formats.](https://fathom.video/share/yBBfTxLw2L2rx7Z-zGugVtQWPfEcsmfv?tab=summary&timestamp=592.0)
  - [**Goal:** Expand beyond core topics to indirectly engage the small business owner audience.](https://fathom.video/share/yBBfTxLw2L2rx7Z-zGugVtQWPfEcsmfv?tab=summary&timestamp=994.0)
  - [**Format Exploration:**](https://fathom.video/share/yBBfTxLw2L2rx7Z-zGugVtQWPfEcsmfv?tab=summary&timestamp=1044.0)
      - [**Relay's Interest:** Listicles, quizzes, interviews, and other dynamic structures.](https://fathom.video/share/yBBfTxLw2L2rx7Z-zGugVtQWPfEcsmfv?tab=summary&timestamp=1044.0)
      - [**GrowthX's Capability:** Strong at programmatic content (e.g., building large, templated content libraries for specific search intent). Less suited for high-touch, dev-heavy formats like interactive quizzes.](https://fathom.video/share/yBBfTxLw2L2rx7Z-zGugVtQWPfEcsmfv?tab=summary&timestamp=1182.0)
  - [**Action:** GrowthX will provide examples of their programmatic work to serve as thought starters for Relay.](https://fathom.video/share/yBBfTxLw2L2rx7Z-zGugVtQWPfEcsmfv?tab=summary&timestamp=1277.0)

### Operational Updates

  - [**Disclosure Format Change:**](https://fathom.video/share/yBBfTxLw2L2rx7Z-zGugVtQWPfEcsmfv?tab=summary&timestamp=632.0)
      - [**New Rule:** Thread approved a cleaner format using a superscript link to a dedicated disclosure section at the bottom of the article.](https://fathom.video/share/yBBfTxLw2L2rx7Z-zGugVtQWPfEcsmfv?tab=summary&timestamp=632.0)
      - [**Process Impact:** Dave is manually adding jump links in Google Docs. GrowthX will automate this process once Dave documents the new rules.](https://fathom.video/share/yBBfTxLw2L2rx7Z-zGugVtQWPfEcsmfv?tab=summary&timestamp=673.0)
  - [**Knowledge Base Management:**](https://fathom.video/share/yBBfTxLw2L2rx7Z-zGugVtQWPfEcsmfv?tab=summary&timestamp=763.0)
      - [**Problem:** Frequent rule changes (e.g., disclosure guidelines) create process "tech debt."](https://fathom.video/share/yBBfTxLw2L2rx7Z-zGugVtQWPfEcsmfv?tab=summary&timestamp=763.0)
      - [**Solution:** Create a single source of truth—a running doc for Dave to update—to ensure all teams work from the latest guidelines.](https://fathom.video/share/yBBfTxLw2L2rx7Z-zGugVtQWPfEcsmfv?tab=summary&timestamp=763.0)
      - [**Action:** Bailey will update all Notion docs to reflect the latest guidelines and share them with Dave for review.](https://fathom.video/share/yBBfTxLw2L2rx7Z-zGugVtQWPfEcsmfv?tab=summary&timestamp=842.0)

### Content Pipeline & Performance

  - [**Topic Pipeline:** Dave approved 10 new topics, creating a sufficient runway.](https://fathom.video/share/yBBfTxLw2L2rx7Z-zGugVtQWPfEcsmfv?tab=summary&timestamp=140.0)
  - [**Topic Balance:** The focus on "accountants and bookkeepers" will shift from primary to an equal cluster. Dave will review the pipeline to ensure a healthy spread.](https://fathom.video/share/yBBfTxLw2L2rx7Z-zGugVtQWPfEcsmfv?tab=summary&timestamp=157.0)
  - [**December Report:** The report is available for review. Traffic was healthy despite holiday seasonality.](https://fathom.video/share/yBBfTxLw2L2rx7Z-zGugVtQWPfEcsmfv?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Relay (Dave):**](https://fathom.video/share/yBBfTxLw2L2rx7Z-zGugVtQWPfEcsmfv?tab=summary&timestamp=721.0)
      - [Document the new Thread disclosure rules for GrowthX automation.](https://fathom.video/share/yBBfTxLw2L2rx7Z-zGugVtQWPfEcsmfv?tab=summary&timestamp=721.0)
      - [Create a running doc for all process/rule changes.](https://fathom.video/share/yBBfTxLw2L2rx7Z-zGugVtQWPfEcsmfv?tab=summary&timestamp=763.0)
      - [Review the content pipeline to ensure topic balance.](https://fathom.video/share/yBBfTxLw2L2rx7Z-zGugVtQWPfEcsmfv?tab=summary&timestamp=157.0)
  - [**Relay (Dave & Bethany):**](https://fathom.video/share/yBBfTxLw2L2rx7Z-zGugVtQWPfEcsmfv?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
      - [Meet next week to finalize 2026 planning notes.](https://fathom.video/share/yBBfTxLw2L2rx7Z-zGugVtQWPfEcsmfv?tab=summary&timestamp=379.0)
      - [Schedule the 2026 planning session for late January.](https://fathom.video/share/yBBfTxLw2L2rx7Z-zGugVtQWPfEcsmfv?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
  - [**GrowthX (Bailey):**](https://fathom.video/share/yBBfTxLw2L2rx7Z-zGugVtQWPfEcsmfv?tab=summary&timestamp=842.0)
      - [Update all Notion guideline docs and share with Dave.](https://fathom.video/share/yBBfTxLw2L2rx7Z-zGugVtQWPfEcsmfv?tab=summary&timestamp=842.0)
      - [Compile and share examples of programmatic content.](https://fathom.video/share/yBBfTxLw2L2rx7Z-zGugVtQWPfEcsmfv?tab=summary&timestamp=1277.0)
      - [Consult with the director team for expansion ideas for the planning session.](https://fathom.video/share/yBBfTxLw2L2rx7Z-zGugVtQWPfEcsmfv?tab=summary&timestamp=1277.0)
